name: failure-corpus-phase1
description: Replayable known-bad retrievals and edge cases for regression checks.

cases.prompt: Which project belongs to Brian personally instead of Dirt Road Systems?
cases.notes: Regression target for cases where the company node outranks the Brian-owned exception.

cases.prompt: Which file should I read for Brian's durable profile, USER.md or the graph summary?
cases.notes: Replay wording that mentions files directly so canonical Brian retrieval stays centered.
